queries.sql_text: SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(PAT_VISIT_001) */ p.patient_id, p.name, v.visit_date FROM patient p JOIN visit v ON p.id = v.patient_id WHERE v.visit_date >= SYSDATE - 30
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(OPD_LIST_002) */ d.dept_name, COUNT(*) FROM opd_schedule s JOIN department d ON s.dept_id = d.id GROUP BY d.dept_name ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(ADM_STAT_003) */ TO_CHAR(admission_date,'YYYY-MM') ym, COUNT(*) cnt FROM admission GROUP BY TO_CHAR(admission_date,'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY 1
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(LAB_RESULT_004) */ l.test_code, l.result_value FROM lab_result l WHERE l.patient_id = :pid AND l.test_date BETWEEN :from AND :to ORDER BY l.test_date DESC
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(DRUG_ORDER_005) */ do.drug_code, d.drug_name, do.qty FROM drug_order do JOIN drug d ON do.drug_code = d.code WHERE do.order_date = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(EMR_SEARCH_006) */ e.emr_id, e.diagnosis FROM emr_record e WHERE e.icd_code LIKE :icd_prefix AND e.record_date > SYSDATE - 90
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(BED_STATUS_007) */ w.ward_name, b.bed_no, b.status FROM bed b JOIN ward w ON b.ward_id = w.id WHERE b.status IN ('occupied','reserved')
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(BILL_CALC_008) */ b.bill_id, SUM(bi.amount) total FROM billing b JOIN billing_item bi ON b.id = bi.bill_id WHERE b.bill_date = :bdate GROUP BY b.bill_id
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(SURG_SCHED_009) */ ss.surgery_date, ss.room_no, p.name FROM surgery_schedule ss JOIN patient p ON ss.patient_id = p.id WHERE ss.surgery_date BETWEEN :from AND :to
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(INS_CLAIM_010) */ ic.claim_no, ic.claim_amt, ic.status FROM ins_claim ic WHERE ic.claim_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE,'MM') AND ic.status = 'PENDING'
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(PAT_VISIT_001) */ p.patient_id, p.name, v.visit_date FROM patient p JOIN visit v ON p.id = v.patient_id WHERE v.visit_date >= SYSDATE - 30
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(OPD_LIST_002) */ d.dept_name, COUNT(*) FROM opd_schedule s JOIN department d ON s.dept_id = d.id GROUP BY d.dept_name ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(LAB_RESULT_004) */ l.test_code, l.result_value, l.unit FROM lab_result l JOIN lab_master lm ON l.test_code = lm.code WHERE l.patient_id = :pid AND l.test_date BETWEEN :from AND :to
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(ADM_STAT_003) */ TO_CHAR(admission_date,'YYYY-MM') ym, COUNT(*) cnt FROM admission GROUP BY TO_CHAR(admission_date,'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY 1
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(DRUG_ORDER_005) */ do.drug_code, d.drug_name, do.qty FROM drug_order do JOIN drug d ON do.drug_code = d.code WHERE do.order_date = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(NICU_MON_011) */ nm.monitor_time, nm.hr, nm.spo2 FROM nicu_monitor nm WHERE nm.admit_id = :aid ORDER BY nm.monitor_time DESC
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(EMR_SEARCH_006) */ e.emr_id, e.diagnosis FROM emr_record e WHERE e.icd_code LIKE :icd_prefix AND e.record_date > SYSDATE - 90
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(BED_STATUS_007) */ w.ward_name, b.bed_no, b.status FROM bed b JOIN ward w ON b.ward_id = w.id WHERE b.status IN ('occupied','reserved')
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(BILL_CALC_008) */ b.bill_id, SUM(bi.amount) total FROM billing b JOIN billing_item bi ON b.id = bi.bill_id WHERE b.bill_date = :bdate GROUP BY b.bill_id
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(SURG_SCHED_009) */ ss.surgery_date, ss.room_no, p.name FROM surgery_schedule ss JOIN patient p ON ss.patient_id = p.id WHERE ss.surgery_date BETWEEN :from AND :to
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(PAT_VISIT_001) */ p.patient_id, p.name, v.visit_date FROM patient p JOIN visit v ON p.id = v.patient_id WHERE v.visit_date >= SYSDATE - 30
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(LAB_RESULT_004) */ l.test_code, l.result_value FROM lab_result l WHERE l.patient_id = :pid AND l.test_date BETWEEN :from AND :to
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(OPD_LIST_002) */ d.dept_name, COUNT(*) FROM opd_schedule s JOIN department d ON s.dept_id = d.id GROUP BY d.dept_name ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(ICU_VITAL_012) */ iv.patient_id, iv.bp_sys, iv.bp_dia, iv.temp FROM icu_vital iv WHERE iv.check_time BETWEEN :from AND :to ORDER BY iv.check_time
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(ADM_STAT_003) */ TO_CHAR(admission_date,'YYYY-MM') ym, COUNT(*) cnt FROM admission GROUP BY TO_CHAR(admission_date,'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY 1
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(NICU_MON_011) */ nm.monitor_time, nm.hr, nm.spo2 FROM nicu_monitor nm WHERE nm.admit_id = :aid ORDER BY nm.monitor_time DESC
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(DRUG_ORDER_005) */ do.drug_code, d.drug_name, do.qty FROM drug_order do JOIN drug d ON do.drug_code = d.code WHERE do.order_date = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(EMR_SEARCH_006) */ e.emr_id, e.diagnosis FROM emr_record e WHERE e.icd_code LIKE :icd_prefix AND e.record_date > SYSDATE - 90

SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(BILL_CALC_008) */ b.bill_id, SUM(bi.amount) total FROM billing b JOIN billing_item bi ON b.id = bi.bill_id WHERE b.bill_date = :bdate GROUP BY b.bill_id
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(PAT_VISIT_001) */ p.patient_id, p.name, v.visit_date FROM patient p JOIN visit v ON p.id = v.patient_id WHERE v.visit_date >= SYSDATE - 30
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(ICU_VITAL_012) */ iv.patient_id, iv.bp_sys, iv.bp_dia, iv.temp FROM icu_vital iv WHERE iv.check_time BETWEEN :from AND :to ORDER BY iv.check_time
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(LAB_RESULT_004) */ l.test_code, l.result_value FROM lab_result l WHERE l.patient_id = :pid AND l.test_date BETWEEN :from AND :to
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(NICU_MON_011) */ nm.monitor_time, nm.hr, nm.spo2 FROM nicu_monitor nm WHERE nm.admit_id = :aid ORDER BY nm.monitor_time DESC
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(OPD_LIST_002) */ d.dept_name, COUNT(*) FROM opd_schedule s JOIN department d ON s.dept_id = d.id GROUP BY d.dept_name ORDER BY 2 DESC
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(ADM_STAT_003) */ TO_CHAR(admission_date,'YYYY-MM') ym, COUNT(*) cnt FROM admission GROUP BY TO_CHAR(admission_date,'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY 1
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(PHARM_DISP_013) */ pd.dispense_id, pd.drug_code, pd.qty, pd.dispense_time FROM pharm_dispense pd WHERE pd.dispense_time >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND pd.status = 'COMPLETED'
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(DRUG_ORDER_005) */ do.drug_code, d.drug_name, do.qty FROM drug_order do JOIN drug d ON do.drug_code = d.code WHERE do.order_date = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
SELECT /*+ SQL_ID(EMR_SEARCH_006) */ e.emr_id, e.diagnosis FROM emr_record e WHERE e.icd_code LIKE :icd_prefix AND e.record_date > SYSDATE - 90
